ORDER GRANTING SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS BY DEFENDANT JACK NOE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JACK NOE'S MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS (CCP 425.16(C)(1)): ON MAY 26, 2020, IN A PUBLISHED OPINION, THE COURT OF APPEAL REVERSED THIS COURT'S ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT JACK NOE'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE UNDER THE ANTI-SLAPP STATUTE, CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16, AND REMANDED THE MATTER TO THIS COURT TO ENTER AN ORDER GRANTING THE MOTION AND TO CONDUCT FURTHER PROCEEDINGS CONSISTENT WITH ITS OPINION. (DORIT V. NOE (2020) 49 CAL.APP.5TH 458.) THE REMITTITUR HAVING ISSUED, THAT OPINION IS NOW FINAL. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT GRANTS NOE'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT. THE COURT GRANTS NOE'S MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $72,715.50 IN ATTORNEY FEES AND $1,888.40 IN COSTS, FOR A TOTAL OF $74,603.90. (SEE WORD MINUTE FOR DETAILS.) COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2020 Continued To Jan-06-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Jack Noe For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs (Ccp ? 425.16(C)(1)); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Aaron P. Morris
Off Calendar Oct-01-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JACK NOE's Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs (CCP 425.16(C)(1)): On May 26, 2020, in a published opinion, the Court of Appeal reversed this court's order denying defendant Jack Noe's special motion to strike under the anti-SLAPP statute, Code of Civil Procedure section 425.16, and remanded the matter to this court to enter an order granting the motion and to conduct further proceedings consistent with its opinion. (Dorit v. Noe (2020) 49 Cal.App.5th 458.) The remittitur having issued, that opinion is now final. Accordingly, the court grants Noe's special motion to strike the complaint. The court grants Noe's motion for award of attorney fees and costs in the amount of $72,715.50 in attorney fees and $1,888.40 in costs, for a total of $74,603.90. (see word minute for details.)

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Dorit Pltf Not Mtn And Memo Re Amend Compl
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Off Calendar
